title: Villager Trade Levels
quickAnswer: Villagers unlock trades in five tiers: novice, apprentice, journeyman, expert, and master. They gain progress by completing trades, not by time passing.
keyFacts: More trades appear as the villager levels up, so weak early offers can hide strong later ones.
Experience comes from successful trades with that villager only.
Restocking replenishes uses, but it does not level the villager by itself.
commonMistakes: Ignoring a useful villager because its best trade is locked behind later tiers.
Confusing restock availability with villager experience progress.
